message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="scott-wlaschin" color="yellow" summary="Understood: implementation steps within single V1, ready to implement">
Clear, understood. Implementation steps within a single V1 release, not separate phases/releases. All 8 stories are Must Have -- accepted.

The interleaved order (build destination, then build its clarify path) is the right approach from a domain perspective. Each step extends the `ProcessingOutcome` type with one new variant and delivers a working increment. The domain architecture was designed for exactly this kind of incremental extension.

Documents reviewed, positions aligned. Ready to implement.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Scott confirming alignment. Already settled. Standing by for Luca's Task #11 progress on the remaining 3 items.
